info.title: StreamFlix Streaming Service API
info.description: Video streaming and playback management for the StreamFlix streaming platform

post.description: Initialize a new streaming session and get playback URL

403.description: Content not available for this user

get.description: Retrieve details of an active stream session
Get HLS or DASH manifest for the stream
Retrieve available bitrate and quality profiles for a content
Get current quality and bitrate setting for a stream

put.description: Update quality and bitrate setting for a stream

get.description: Retrieve available subtitle tracks for a content
Get the currently selected subtitle track for a stream

put.description: Select or change the subtitle track for a stream

delete.description: Disable subtitle display for a stream

get.description: Retrieve available audio tracks for a content
Get the currently selected audio track for a stream

put.description: Select or change the audio track for a stream

post.description: Initialize download of content for offline viewing

403.description: Download not allowed for this content or user

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific download

post.description: Update playback progress and state for a stream
Get the resume point for content playback
Acquire DRM license for protected content

403.description: DRM license not available for this content or user

get.description: Retrieve details of a DRM license

percentage.description: Resume position as percentage of duration
